name: Pasta Palace
description: From our Nonna's kitchen to your table — every pasta tells a story of tradition, passion, and the finest Italian ingredients.
hero_quote: Life is a combination of magic and pasta.
history_intro: What started as a small family trattoria has grown into a beloved Italian dining destination, with every recipe passed down through three generations.

history.title: The Trattoria Opens
history.description: Maria and Giovanni opened a 12-seat trattoria with Nonna Rosa's original pasta recipes.

history.title: Pasta Academy
history.description: Launched weekly pasta-making workshops — now fully booked months in advance.

history.title: AI Sommelier
history.description: Introduced AI-powered wine and pasta pairing recommendations.

why_us.title: Fresh Pasta Daily
why_us.description: Made from scratch every morning using imported Italian flour.

why_us.title: Nonna's Recipes
why_us.description: Three generations of authentic Italian recipes.

why_us.title: AI Pairing
why_us.description: Smart wine and pasta pairing at your fingertips.

why_us.title: Wood-Fired Oven
why_us.description: Authentic Neapolitan pizza from our 900°F oven.

why_us.title: Family Recipe
why_us.description: Every dish comes with a story and a smile.

ai_waiter.name: Pasta Bot
ai_waiter.personality: Warm and passionate about Italian food and culture
ai_waiter.greeting: Benvenuto! Welcome to Pasta Palace. Let me help you discover the perfect pasta.

reviews.name: Amit S.
reviews.text: Best truffle pasta I've had outside of Italy. Absolutely divine.

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: The pasta-making class was amazing. And the food? Mamma mia!

reviews.name: Vikram P.
reviews.text: Incredible wood-fired pizza and the wine list is outstanding.

offers.title: Pasta Making Class
offers.description: Learn to make fresh pasta every Saturday — includes lunch!

offers.title: Wine Wednesday
offers.description: Half-price on all Italian wines every Wednesday evening
